issue_text: The gas line near the boiler room is emitting a faint hissing sound and staff can smell sulfur.
A worker was struck by a falling shelf bracket and is reporting arm pain.
Ammonia leak detected near the cold storage compressor room, staff evacuated.
The industrial press machine guard was removed for cleaning and never replaced.
Forklift brakes failed on the ramp and it rolled into a parked vehicle.
A scaffold plank on level 3 is cracked and workers are still walking on it.
Chemical storage drum leaking unidentified liquid near the ventilation intake.
Three employees reported dizziness after entering the spray booth this morning.
Electrical panel in workshop B is sparking and emitting a burning smell.
Roof access hatch is unlocked and a technician nearly fell through it.
Non-slip mat at the entrance has curled edges and two visitors tripped today.
Emergency eyewash station near the lab is out of water and non-functional.
Loading dock edge has no guard rail and workers walk past it in the dark.
Ceiling fan blade in the workshop is cracked and vibrating during operation.
No wet floor signs despite ongoing mopping in a high-traffic customer area.
Oxygen cylinder in the welding zone stored horizontally without securing straps.
First aid kit has not been restocked in three months and is nearly empty.
Employees working without PPE near the sanding station due to stock shortage.
The ladder used for shelf stocking is missing a rung and has been duct-taped.
The fume hood in the sample prep area stopped working two days ago.
Our order management system has been down for six hours — we cannot process sales.
Main server room UPS failed during outage and all virtual machines went down.
Point-of-sale terminals are offline at all three checkouts during peak hours.
CRM database is returning errors and the sales team cannot access records.
Payroll processing system is inaccessible and salary run is due tomorrow.
Cloud storage is read-only after hitting quota limits — teams cannot upload.
Automated invoice generation failed and 200 invoices are stuck in the queue.
Manufacturing execution system lost sync and production output is halted.
Network switch failure disconnected our entire finance department from systems.
CCTV recording storage is full and footage is no longer being saved.
The potted plants in the lobby need watering — they are visibly wilting.
Office chair in meeting room 2 has a squeaky wheel.
The coffee machine on level 1 is running slowly and takes longer to brew.
The vending machine does not accept coins and only takes card payments.
Signage outside unit 7 has faded and is hard to read in daylight.
The soap dispenser in the ground floor washroom drips constantly.
Blinds in the south-facing office are broken and glare affects screen work.
The hand dryer in the male restroom takes 90 seconds to dry hands.
Rubbish bin in the stairwell has not been emptied for two days.
The welcome mat at reception is fraying at the edges and looks untidy.
Automatic roller shutter does not stop when the sensor detects obstruction.
Cable trays above aisle 4 are overloaded and drooping from ceiling mounts.
Industrial washing machine vibrates excessively and has shifted 15cm.
Floor drain grate in production area is cracked and a foot could go through it.
Emergency stop button on line 3 is stuck in the pressed position.
Dust accumulation on electrical enclosures near woodworking zone is excessive.
Ventilation duct in the spray area is partially blocked reducing airflow by half.
One fire suppression nozzle above the server room is bent and misaligned.
Staff are using an extension lead as permanent wiring under a workbench.
Ground fault interrupter in the wet kitchen area has tripped and not reset.
Refrigerated transport truck broke down and perishable cargo must be offloaded.
Compliance submission portal is locked and the regulatory deadline is in 4 hours.
Label printer is jammed and 300 outbound parcels are sitting unlabelled.
All projectors in training rooms failed before a client presentation in one hour.
Shift schedule system is down and tomorrow's roster cannot be published.
There is a small oil patch on the workshop floor near the entrance.
The handrail on the last three steps of the external staircase is slightly wobbly.
A faint burning smell is occasionally noticed near the server cabinet in room 2B.
One safety interlock sensor on the conveyor appears to have a loose connection.
A ceiling tile above the electrical panel was water-damaged and has softened.
Visitor management tablet offline as a large delegation is arriving now.
Water cooler in boardroom ran out ahead of a 3-hour executive session.
Elevator inspection certificate expired and building manager is unavailable.
Intercom to the goods receiving bay is broken and a delivery truck is waiting.
Canteen vendor has not arrived and 80 staff are expecting lunch in 30 minutes.
A structural crack appeared overnight in a non-operational storage annex wall.
Exposed live wire found in an unused section of the basement car park.
Old asbestos ceiling tiles found crumbling in an unoccupied section of the building.
A corroded gas pipe joint was discovered during routine inspection in plant room.
Safety harness rack in the roof access room has a cracked anchor point.
Our e-commerce platform is inaccessible and online sales have stopped completely.
The enterprise ERP system crashed and no business data can be accessed.
VoIP phone system down — 200 staff cannot make or receive external calls.
Customer data export scheduled for an audit cannot be generated due to a system bug.
Our backup internet line is also down, leaving the site with zero connectivity.
A structural crack appeared in the load-bearing wall of the main warehouse.
Fire suppression activated falsely and flooded the server room.
An employee collapsed near the chemical mixing station and is unresponsive.
The transformer outside the building exploded and the entire site is without power.
A vehicle drove through the perimeter fence and is inside the yard near workers.
